# configuration

**Instance Property**

The configuration for a taker work which contains an optional manual score for the document.

## Declaration

```swift
var configuration: any AssignedWorkDocumentConfiguration { get set }
```

## Getting the configuration

- **AssignedWorkDocument.Configuration**: The configuration for an assessment taker work which contains an optional manual score for the document.
